{{Infobox character
| name = Anagi
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Overlord, Archlord, provincial ruler
| abilities = soulfire baptisms, blue madra, Ruler techniques, soulfire, black flames
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

''See also: [[Anagi Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Anagi is an [[Archlord]] and the provincial ruler of [[Sailfin Port]], holding jurisdiction over its surrounding territories. Though he is considered a minor authority compared to the more powerful [[Monarch]] families, he possesses significant strength and commands a group known as the [[Flashing Knives]]. He is equipped with a sickle-and-chain weapon and is accompanied by a winged dolphin that hovers near him. Anagi has demonstrated a defiant attitude toward higher authorities, such as [[Sages]], and has even engaged in combat using black flames.}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Anagi]] is someone [[Yan Shoumei]] mentions.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Shoumei]] can have [[Anagi]]'s head on a plate as a reward.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Anagi is a provincial ruler and an [[Overlord]] who ascended from the rank of [[Archlord]] only one year prior. To perfect his physical form, he underwent three [[soulfire]] baptisms and utilizes blue madra alongside [[Ruler techniques]]. He wields a chain-and-sickle weapon that possesses a blue shine and a [[binding]] imbued with the fury of an ocean storm. While positioning his students for an upcoming invasion, he is seen wounded and with depleted [[madra]], even bursting into black flames. Throughout his actions, his voice is described as warm and slippery like a squirming eel.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Anagi]] is an [[Overlord]] who was an [[Archlord]] a year ago.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Anagi]] is positioning his students for invasion.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Anagi]] has undergone three [[soulfire]] baptisms to perfect his body.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Anagi]]'s voice is described as slippery and warm like a squirming eel.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Anagi]] is a provincial ruler who exercises authority over those beneath him.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Anagi]] uses blue madra.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Anagi]]'s weapon has a blue shine and its [[binding]] carries the fury of an ocean storm.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Anagi]] possesses [[Ruler techniques]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Anagi]] has [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Anagi]] is an [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Anagi]] is wounded and has depleted [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Anagi]] uses a chain-and-sickle weapon.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Anagi]] burst into black flames.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Anagi]] was a powerful [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|“Tell Anagi that he was too late! I have everything I need.”<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Shoumei, you can have Anagi’s head on a plate.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
